title: WOTAHI 2-Piece Rubber Mallet Hammer Set-16 oz. White and Black Rubber Mallet and 35 mm Dual Nylon Head Installation Hammer, Soft Grip Fiberglass Handle, Double-Faced Non-marring and Solid Head
features: WOTAHI Rubber Mallet Hammer Set includes 1 pc 16 oz white and black rubber mallet and 1 pc 35 mm double nylon head installation hammer

WOTAHI Hammer Set has 2 different hammer heads, double-sided, non-marking white and black solid rubber head, non-marring solid nylon head, both heads delivers softened positive strike, you can strike safely without damaging sensitive finishes or surfaces

WOTAHI Mallet Hammer handle made of high-strength,lightweight fiberglass to naturally dampen stinging vibrations, and the virtually unbreakable handle core features soft, non-slip rubber sleeve to prevent slipping and absorb impact for ultimate comfort

The mallet head and handle adopt reliable embedding technology to firmly connect mallet head and handle to prevent loosening or falling off, ensuring that the head will not break or the handle will fall off, ensuring safety and extending the service life

Essential Tools for Your Toolbox: WOTAHI Mallet Hammer Set comes in 2 different styles to meet your basic needs, allowing you to safely work with construction, furniture, metal, automotive, tire, flooring, leather work
description: Product Description 2 Different Hammer Heads Double-sided, non-marking white and black solid rubber head, non-marring solid nylon head Positive Strike Strike safely without damaging sensitive finishes or surfaces Ultimate Comfort Handle High-strength,lightweight fiberglass to naturally dampen stinging vibrations, features soft, non-slip rubber sleeve Reliable Embedding Technology Firmly connect the mallet head and handle to prevent loosening or falling off, ensuring that the head will not break or the handle will fall off WOTAHI 16 oz.White and Black Rubber Mallet Double-face non-marking solid rubber head High-Strength fiberglass handle helps absorbs vibrations Soft,non-slip rubber sleeve WOTAHI 35 mm Nylon Head Installation Hammer Double-face non-marring solid nylon head High-Strength fiberglass handle helps absorbs vibrations Soft,non-slip rubber sleeve
